publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-05-20 23:59:31 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Athletic event programs, photographs, annual reports, advertisements, plaques, cups, films and clippings concerning various Cornell athletic events, including women's athletics, and a certificate of incorporation of the Cornell Athletic Association.
did.physdesc: Programs, photographs, advertisements, clippings, reports, and a certificate.

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Folders for individual athletes and coaches may contain personally identifiable information or other sensative items and need to be reviewed before being made available.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Sports Programs and Team Booklets Boxes 1-4, 7, 9, 10
Series II. Reports and Handbooks Boxes 5, 6
Series III. Notes, Memos, and Brochures Box 6
Series IV. Articles and Clippings Boxes 5, 6, 8
Series VII. Movie Films, Videos and other media Box 9
Series VIII. Plaques and cups Museum items (MU)

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Martin Heggestad, May 2003 Maria Keating, May 2004

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Athletics Records, #40-1-370. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Related collections: Football Miscellany, 37-5-3981; Crew Records, 40-1-924; Hockey Films and Ephemera Collection, 40-4-3590; Football motion pictures, 40-2-2205; Track And Field Collection, 40-9-1820.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Athletic event programs and booklets, photographs, annual reports, advertisements, plaques, cups, films and clippings concerning various Cornell athletic events including women's athletics, and a certificate of incorporation of the Cornell Athletic Association. Also Cornell Victorious, the Cornell Campaign for Athletics, ca. 1990, V-790; Design plans for the Bartels Hall (formerly Alberding Field House), V-6028; Illini Reflections, ca. 1990 overview of past University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign events and life as presented by past university alumni. Included are Judi Ford-Johnson '73, Roger Ebert '64, Roger Plummer '84, Lester Leutwiler '29, Tom Haller '58, Ray Nitschke '58, and Dick Butkus '64, V-6029. Films include: Here We Are Again, 2 copies, ca. 1985, film about the history of Cornell athletics, F-478, 479; Stanford Today, 1985, film about Stanford University and its athletic programs, F-480. Also a film of a Cornell Soccer game ca. 1958-1960, F-390. Also slides from the 1974 Cornell and Cornellians presentation by Laurence Koplik.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage. Audio visual media that has been digitized: F-390.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: April 2022: All material relating to Ice Hockey was transferred to the Cornell University Ice Hockey collection, #40-4-3590. This includes box 44, as well as various folders in other boxes. See Finding Aid for more information.

did.unittitle: Series I. Sports Programs and Team Booklets

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Constitution and By-Laws of the Cornell University Athletic Association, 1916

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Rules and Regulations Governing Athletics In Cornell University, issued by the Council on Physical Education and Athletics, 1939.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Athletics Hall of Fame Induction Ceremony programs 1979-1984

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes an envelope to L.C. Jackson from the Cornell B.B. Association, R.C. McCormick manager, January 30, 1891. Also includes a photograph of the 1903 baseball team.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: -includes November 1916, October 1930, War time imagery October 1942 (including at Syracuse game), 1943, 1946 (Thanksgiving game), 1952, 1965, 1968, 1979

did.unittitle: Swimming and Diving Men and Women
Activity Reports: (Womens) Folk and Square Dancing
Annual Reports: Physical Education for Women

Annual Reports: Physical Education for Women

Annual Reports: Physical Education for Women
Annual Reports: Physical Education for Women
Annual Reports: Physical Education for Women
Women's Cross Country: Summery of 1976 Season
Organization and Administration of the Dept. of Physical Education for Women
Biannual Report of the Sports Advisory Committee to the Dept. Of P.E. and Athletics
Report of the Trustee Ad Hoc Committee on Athletics
Minority Report of the Trustee Ad Hoc Committee on Athletics, Judith Younger
Fincancial Developement Plan for Physical Education and Athletics: Cornell
W.A.A. Award Proposal and Cornell Women's SPorts Newsletter
Events and Memorable Experiences by F.R. Newman and Articles From The Allied Private
Department of Athletics and Physical Education Team Faculty Advisor Handbook
Department of Athletics and Physical Education Student-Athlete Handbook
Series III. Notes, Memos, and Brochures
Women's Ice Hockey: Photo, Memo, Newspaper Clipping
Women's Ski Team and Tennis Team Photos
Correspondence: Dedication of Helen Newman Hall
Correspondence: Deactivation of Women's Athletic Association
Correspondence: Martha Arnett (Speaker at "Class of 1927" Banquet)
Series VII. Movie Films, Videos and other media
Slides for Cornellians and Cornell presentation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Slide show made as part of a presentation by Laurence Koplik '72 and the Cornell Office of Public Information, visual Services and Radio-TV Film. Dedicated to Morris Bishop. Features many photos of various student activities on campus, but particularly athletic teams and coaches.

did.unittitle: Two photo albums showing renovation of Schoellkopf field, crescent bleachers, press box, Hoy field and Alumni fields.
Binder of slides showing Athletic Facilities Study ca. 1983, shows maps of various Cornell athletics facilities and proposals for future expansion.
Cornell Victorious, the Cornell Campaign for Athletics [VHS]
Design plans for the Bartels Hall (formerly Alberding Field House) [VHS]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Overview of past University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign events and life as presented by past university alumni. Included are Judi Ford-Johnson '73, Roger Ebert '64, Roger Plummer '84, Lester Leutwiler '29, Tom Haller '58, Ray Nitschke '58, and Dick Butkus '64.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Home soccer game on alumni field.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Film about the history of Cornell athletics.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Film about Stanford University and its athletic programs.

did.unittitle: Photos and negatives of inter-college athletic championship banners and plaques
Inter College Cup for Baseball, engraved with winners from 1905 through 1914
Inter College Cup for Soccer, engraved with winners from 1908 through 1913
Inter College Cup for Cross Country, engraved with winners from 1906 through 1914
Inter College Athletic Championship Cross Country plaque
Inter College Athletic Championship Soccer plaque
Inter College Athletic Championship Track plaque

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes for individual athletes and coaches in Series X may contain personally identifiable information or other sensative items and need to be reviewed before being made available.
